title: Friday Sermon 29 March 1985
description:
A Review of the Pakistani Government's 'White Paper' Qadiyaniyyat — A Grave Threat to Islam: Convincing & Decisive Rebuttals to the Objections Against the Holy Founder of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community.

In 1984 the Islamic government of Pakistan set aside all Islamic injunctions and took upon itself the burden of depriving the Ahmadi Muslims of many basic human rights including religious and social freedoms. In an attempt to justify this action, the government of Pakistan published a so-called White Paper under the title 'Qadiyaniyyat - Islam Key Liyey Sangin Khatrah' ['Qadiyaniyyat - A Grave Threat to Islam'].

Although there was nothing new in this so-called White Paper and the Community literature already included detailed answers to all the issues which were raised, nevertheless Hazrat Mirza Tahir Ahmad - Khalifatul Masih IV, the then Imam of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community, answered these allegations in a series of Friday Sermons.

'Nay am I not better than this despicable wretch who can scarcely articulate clearly'

'And why have not gold bracelets been bestowed on him or angels come to accompany him in serried ranks?'

Thus did he moved his people and they obeyed him.  Indeed they were a perverse people.

('The Holy Quran'.  al-Zukhruf [The Gold Ornaments]: 53 - 55).

Comprehensive and challenging answers to the baseless and false accusations placed on Hazrat Mirza Ghulam Ahmad - The Promised Messiah (peace be upon him) in the book ‘Qadianiat - Islam ke liye sangeen khatrah’. The accusations range from him being a weak man, an alleged thief, being poor in his childhood and to be living an extremely lavish lifestyle after his declaration of Prophethood, he had staggering problems, doubts about his ancestry etc. A dictator can only reign over deceitful and morally weak people. The allegations that are being placed upon Hazrat Mirza Ghulam Ahmed are similar to the ones, which Pharaoh made upon Prophet Moses (peace be upon him). A time will surely come when kings and leaders all over the world will be desperate to collect blessings and to hold even a piece from the garments of the Promised Messiah (peace be upon him).

The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19850329-UR.pdf
English translation http://www.alislam.org/library/books/Founder-of-AhmadiyyaMuslimJamaat.pdf
